subject: WGS
course_description: Topics will be anounced each semester when the course is offered.
course_notes: (Same as BIOL 190 2) (Same as CS 190) (Freshmen Seminar - Limited to First Year Students Only) (This course will explore the impact and implications of advances in machine learning, also known to many as artificial intelligence (AI), on life in general and college life in particular. This course will introduce the fundamentals of machine learning and large language models (LLMs) in a manner accessible to students across a variety of backgrounds. We will discuss ethical considerations surrounding the use of LLMs in academic work, address issues of bias and fairness in AI algorithms, and examine how AI can support personalized learning. The seminar will also cover the use of predictive analytics for early intervention, methods for evaluating submissions to prevent plagiarism and cheating, and explore current employment trends influenced by AI.) (This description was created with the help of AI.)
